A_RC: Calibrated from USGS Mineral Commodity Summaries 2025 production dominance patterns; reference PDFs downloaded when possible.
A_TR: Calibrated from IEA Critical Minerals and JRC critical raw material technology profiles; intended as normalized material-intensity templates.
X_ET: Calibrated from IRENA/Eurostat-style transition-portfolio shares; replace with country-specific installed capacity shares if available.
WGI: Political Stability and Absence of Violence/Terrorism (PV.EST) optionally downloaded from World Bank API.
